description: extract complete citation metadata from a DOI/PMID/arXiv ID/URL and emit BibTeX
rules: read-only — BibTeX written to record_store as metadata.bib
IDENTIFIER auto-detected as DOI (10.*), PMID (digits), arXiv (NNNN.NNNNN), or URL
ID_FILE (optional) points to a file with one mixed identifier per line
queries CrossRef (DOI), NCBI E-utilities (PMID), or arXiv API; NCBI_EMAIL/NCBI_API_KEY env vars raise PubMed limits
porter degrades gracefully (writes {} and exits 0) when the source API is unreachable
usage: Set IDENTIFIER (a DOI/PMID/arXiv ID/URL) and/or ID_FILE. Output: metadata.bib.
limitation: Requires network access to CrossRef/NCBI/arXiv. PMID extraction is best with NCBI_EMAIL set.
